'''Tahkay''' was a [[Hiromi]] chief navigator of the [[Hiromi Empire]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Kuratcha]]''. He took part in [[Operation: Glorious Destiny]] and the [[Battle of Zeltros]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Behind the scenes==
Tahkay's name may be a pun off George Hosato Takei, the actor who played helmsman Hikaru Sulu on [[Memoryalpha:Star Trek|''Star Trek'']].
